name: hypawave-skills
description: Hypawave Agent Skills — accountless Bitcoin Lightning commerce (Path 3a/3b) for autonomous agents. This repo distributes Agent Skill bundles; it is not an npm package and has no runtime dependencies (the signer's secp256k1 library is vendored).

scripts.validate: npx --yes skills-ref validate dist/standard/hypawave && npx --yes skills-ref validate dist/claude/skills/hypawave
